title: stelis donaxopetala
intro: Stelis donaxopetala is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis donaxopetala include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the roots are prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness their medicinal properties, and are also used in folk medicine to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
